jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - ASCI - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Join the ASCI family as a Senior Teacher in Chennai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About ASCI:
ASCI is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Content Creation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ASCI!
